title: Better Buttons & More Trapdoors
description: Get 6 trapdoors from the recipe, and 8 buttons from one block.
body:
It doesn't make any sense that one entire block of stone only gives you a single tiny button, right? Well, I fixed that. With this data pack, you get 8 buttons from 1 block.

Additionally, trapdoors! They're great for decorating, but they're used up fast! Two just isn't enough. Four of those planks go to waste. And iron ingots! So I fixed that too. Now you get 6 trapdoors from 6 ingredients.
